groups.title: Choice, Mode, Or Option Branch
groups.closureRule: The spell exposes mode selection, option-specific targeting/effects, allocation choices, or player/caster branch choices.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: When Calm Emotions ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal, but the restoration/aftermath state is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/restoration fields for temporary attitude changes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restoresPreviousAttitude or equivalent for the indifference mode.

findings.issue: Arcane Lock suppression lasts 10 minutes while the spell itself is instantaneous; that temporary suppression duration is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary suppression duration fields for other spell/effect suppression.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime suppressesEffect data for Arcane Lock with duration 10 minutes.

findings.issue: The tracking rider lasts until the spell ends but is only useful while both creatures are on the same plane; the same-plane limit is not modeled as an ongoing condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ongoing-condition fields for same-plane gating on duration-bound knowledge effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ongoingCondition samePlaneRequired for the tracking rider.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath and memory effects need post-effect state fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/description as interim representation.

findings.issue: Meld into Stone has several conditional endings and expulsion damage branches that are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add leaveCost, expulsion trigger, and branch damage fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for leave movement, partial destruction/shape change 6d6 Force, and complete destruction/transmutation 50 Force.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath and memory effects need post-effect state fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/description as interim representation.

findings.issue: Each active mode lasts until the spell ends or the caster chooses a different effect, and Part Water then fills back over the next round; runtime lacks mode replacement and restoration timing.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode-duration/replacement fields and restoration-after-mode fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modeDuration and restorationTiming data.

findings.issue: The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time to end the spell, and if the target is awake the messenger can end the trance/spell or wait for sleep; runtime lacks these ending choices.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dream ending choice fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dreamEnding data.

findings.issue: Damage, another spell targeting the creature, or ending before the memory description is complete prevents memory alteration; runtime lacks those ending and success-condition branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add memory modification conditional-ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime memoryModificationEnding data.

findings.issue: Using the reaction ends the resistances and then ends the spell at the end of the caster's next turn; runtime records this as utility options but lacks first-class conditional replacement/ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defense replacement and delayed conditional spell-end fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime defenseReplacement and conditionalSpellEnd data.

findings.issue: Cannot cast spells during the spell, temporary HP loss at end, and the exhaustion save immediately after ending are represented as options/status, but runtime lacks first-class spellcasting restriction and end-trigger aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spellcasting restriction, temporary-HP cleanup, and on-spell-end save fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellcastingRestriction and onSpellEndSave data.

findings.issue: The bead explodes when the spell ends, when touch save fails, or when a thrown bead enters a creature space/collides with an object; runtime records this as options but lacks first-class object-triggered ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delayed projectile collision/touch/end triggers.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime delayedProjectileTriggers data.

findings.issue: Target-damage exclusion and caster-damage group cancellation are preserved in status aftermath and utility options, but runtime lacks first-class per-target cancellation versus caster-wide cancellation fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-target and caster-wide cancellation fields for long-duration transport/setup spells.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cancellationRules data instead of relying only on statusCondition.aftermath/controlOptions.

findings.issue: The image disappears and the spell ends if it takes any damage; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks a typed damage-to-illusion end trigger.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created illusion damage/end trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionDamageEndTrigger data.

groups.title: External Destruction Or Dispel
groups.closureRule: A named external spell, dispel effect, object destruction, movement break, or trigger consumption destroys or ends the created effect.

findings.issue: Ongoing spells end automatically up to the cast slot level and end on successful checks above that level; runtime has no typed dispel/ending data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dispel fields for auto-ended spell level threshold and checked spell level threshold.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dispelMagic data for automatic and checked ending.

findings.issue: Glyph of Warding has movement-break and trigger-consumption ending rules that are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditionalEnding fields for moved distance and one-shot trigger consumption.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for moved-more-than-10-feet break and ends-on-trigger.

findings.issue: Runtime has the attack grant and ammunition creation, but lacks typed ending if the quiver leaves possession and disintegration of created ammunition when the spell ends.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add possession-based ending and created-ammunition cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime swiftQuiverEnding data.

findings.issue: Created ammunition disintegrates when the spell ends; runtime lacks typed cleanup/aftermath data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdAmmunitionCleanup data.

findings.issue: The spell ends when the object is summoned, and the runtime prose also notes Dispel Magic or similar effects on the sapphire end the spell; these ending conditions are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked-token destruction/use and dispel-on-token ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime instantSummonsEnding data.

findings.issue: Individual ward effects can be removed by Dispel Magic, the whole spell ends only when all effects are gone, and animated trees lose magic/reroot when the spell ends; runtime lacks these ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-subeffect dispel and guardian ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime druidGroveEnding data.

findings.issue: The container is destroyed when the spell ends; runtime lacks on-spell-end object destruction data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add on-spell-end object aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime onSpellEndObjectDestruction data.

findings.issue: The spell ends when the cage is destroyed or after the sixth exploit releases the soul; runtime records this as options but lacks first-class use-count and object-destruction end triggers.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add use-count and object-destruction ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime useCountEndCondition and objectDestroyedEndCondition data.

findings.issue: Damage-ending and custom early-ending conditions are preserved in status break triggers and utility options, but runtime lacks arbitrary visible-within-1-mile ending condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add custom conditional ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime customEndCondition data with triggerRange.

findings.issue: The glyph can end without triggering if moved too far, and triggered light lasts 10 minutes before the spell ends; runtime lacks first-class moved-too-far break and triggered-duration ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object movement break and triggered duration ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardBreakDistance and triggeredDurationEnd data.

groups.title: AI Arbitration Or Custom Resolution
groups.closureRule: The finding likely cannot be captured with current deterministic schema without custom or AI-arbitrated handling.

findings.issue: When Charm Person ends, the target knows it was Charmed by the caster; this aftermath knowledge is not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath awareness fields for target knowledge after spell end.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath data recording that the target knows it was Charmed by the caster.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the creature knows it was Charmed by the caster; runtime has no aftermath awareness field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath awareness fields for knows_charmed_by_caster.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermathAwareness data.

findings.issue: The extra damage is now hit-triggered, but per-ammunition magic ending on hit or miss, the twelve-piece draw limit, and +2 ammunition per higher slot remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add empowered ammunition fields for count, hit-or-miss consumption, draw limit, and slot scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ammunitionPool data for 12 pieces, +2 per slot above 3, and per-piece magic ending on hit or miss.

findings.issue: Haste's end-of-spell lethargy is a delayed aftermath effect that needs first-class spell-end timing.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath fields for spell-end effects, status, movement override, and end timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath/spellEndEffect data instead of immediate status.

findings.issue: Tiny Hut has a casting failure precondition based on whether the area fully encapsulates creatures.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add castFailureCondition fields for area encapsulation requirements.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castFailure data for not fully encapsulating all creatures in area.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by the caster; runtime lacks post-spell awareness/memory data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for target awareness after enchantments.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime postEffectAwareness data.

findings.issue: The target-to-ash death aftermath is mechanically relevant for corpse/object state but remains prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death aftermath transformation fields for spell-kill outcomes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathAftermath data for ash transformation.

findings.issue: Temporary HP loss and possible Exhaustion after the spell ends are represented, but runtime lacks first-class aftermath trigger data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add on-spell-end aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime onSpellEndAftermath data.

groups.title: Transfer, Retarget, Or Reassignment
groups.closureRule: An effect ends on one target, moves to another target, or can be reassigned while the spell remains active.

findings.issue: If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the curse to a new creature with a later Bonus Action; this transfer rule is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional transfer fields for trigger target_drops_to_0_hp, later bonus-action retargeting, and new creature target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime curseTransfer data for 0-HP trigger and later bonus-action retargeting.

findings.issue: If the marked target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the mark to a new visible creature with a Bonus Action; duration also scales at higher slots.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional transfer fields and duration scaling fields for Hunter's Mark.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime markTransfer data for 0-HP retargeting and durationScaling thresholds for slots 3-4 and 5+.

findings.issue: Remove Curse ends ordinary curses and has a different cursed-magic-item branch that breaks attunement without ending the item curse.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add curseRemoval and cursedMagicItem attunement-break fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime curseEffect data for end curses on creature/object and break owner attunement for cursed magic items.

findings.issue: Speak with Dead has a 10-day retarget failure and a five-question limit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add priorTargetCooldown and maxQuestions fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castFailure if targetedWithinPastDays 10 and maxQuestions 5.

findings.issue: The spell ends on suicidal commands and can be ended by specific spells; runtime lacks typed conditional ending fields for both cases.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for forbidden command endings and external spell removal.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data.

findings.issue: The modified memory takes hold when the spell ends only if the description is complete; runtime lacks typed memory aftermath/finalization data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add memory finalization fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime memoryFinalization data.

findings.issue: Wake-on-damage/shake, Panicked distance-and-sight ending, and cannot-retarget-a-creature-that-succeeded-against-this-casting are preserved in descriptions but not first-class ending/state fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-option ending and per-casting target-immunity fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime eyebiteEnding data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Clone exposes identity, memories, soul location, and revival lockout mechanics that need a dedicated life-state schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add life-state/identity transfer fields for soul transfer, memory/personality continuity, equipment exclusion, and revival lockout.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifeStateTransition fields that can be ignored when not applicable and consumed by resurrection/death systems later.

groups.title: Duration Progression Or Permanence
groups.closureRule: Repeated casting, full-duration concentration, elapsed days, or slot level changes duration, permanence, or concentration requirements.

findings.issue: If the Beast does not reach the destination before the spell ends, the message is lost and the Beast returns to the casting location; duration also scales by slot.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery failure and duration scaling fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deliveryFailure data and durationScaling +48 hours per slot above 2.

findings.issue: Galder's Tower has recast maintenance and a same-location/same-configuration permanence rule that are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recastMaintenance and permanenceCondition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime persistence data for +24 hour recasts and daily same-location/same-configuration one-year permanence.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some ending conditions are represented in prose/options but need reusable break-condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing duration/utility/status break fields as interim data.

findings.issue: The spell has a cumulative 5 percent daily ending chance after 60 days, ends if cast again, and ends if the Tiny replica is destroyed; runtime preserves these only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional ending fields for delayed cumulative chance, recast ending, and linked-object destruction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for the 60-day cumulative chance, recast ending, and replica destruction.

findings.issue: Control can end on a successful Charisma save while the summoned demon remains, and an uncontrolled demon can linger for 1d6 rounds after concentration ends if it still has Hit Points; runtime lacks these ending branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon control-ending and post-concentration linger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlEnding and uncontrolledLinger data.

findings.issue: The spell can end on the target after three repeat-save successes, last 7 days after three failures, and resist later Poisoned-ending effects unless another Constitution save succeeds; runtime lacks those ending branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional status/spell ending fields for counted saves and condition-removal resistance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding and conditionRemovalResistance data.

findings.issue: The devil disappears at 0 hit points or spell end, but if concentration ends after command immunity it remains for 3d6 minutes; runtime lacks those branch endings.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity conditional ending/aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime infernalCallingEnding data.

findings.issue: Three successful repeat saves end the spell, three failed saves convert the state to Petrified, and full-duration concentration changes the ending/removal behavior; runtime lacks those conditional ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-count and concentration-completion ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime fleshToStoneEnding data.

groups.title: Summon, Control, Possession, Or Soul Lifecycle
groups.closureRule: Summoned, animated, controlled, possessed, or soul/container states need lifecycle data distinct from ordinary spell ending.

findings.issue: The one-minute dismount grace after the spell ends is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end aftermath fields for summoned mount fade and dismount grace.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath fadeOut with riderDismountWindow 1 minute.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some ending conditions are represented in prose/options but need reusable break-condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing duration/utility/status break fields as interim data.

findings.issue: Summon lifecycle endings and optional material consumption at spell end are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon lifecycle and conditional component consumption fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifecycle/consumption data tied to spell end and demon HP 0.

findings.issue: The created undead remain under control until the spell ends, then become inanimate; runtime lacks spell-end reversion/lifecycle data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated creature lifecycle ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedUndead.lifecycle data.

findings.issue: If concentration ends after command immunity, the devil acts freely for 3d6 minutes before disappearing; runtime lacks post-concentration aftermath behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon aftermath fields for post-control independent behavior and delayed disappearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonAftermath data.

findings.issue: Completion before spell end changes the creature's behavior, and another summon/creation spell's duration can be extended to match Planar Binding; runtime lacks those conditional duration/ending branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-service completion and linked-spell duration-extension fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarBindingDurationLink data.

findings.issue: The spell fails if the soul is not free or willing; runtime lacks this failure condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul availability failure fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime resurrectionFailure data.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, animated trees take root again if possible; runtime lacks this aftermath state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add guardian reroot aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime guardianAftermath data.

groups.title: End Cleanup: Fall, Descent, Or Prone Outcome
groups.closureRule: A spell or effect ending causes falling, controlled descent, landing prone, or another end-position consequence.

findings.issue: The gentle float to the ground after the spell ends is an aftermath behavior rather than ordinary duration text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath behavior fields for movement effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath data matching the conditional-ending finding.

findings.issue: After the spell ends, restrained creatures are left prone where the sphere falls and normal flames within 30 feet have been extinguished; runtime lacks typed post-end state outcomes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath fields for spell-end prone placement and extinguished normal flames.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellEndAftermath data.

findings.issue: Switching targets ends the previous target's effect and a lifted creature falls unless reapplied; runtime lacks these ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-switch and reapply-or-fall ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekinesisEnding data.

findings.issue: The post-duration permanent wall, non-dispellable state, disappearance fallback, and possible panel-collapse aftermath are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structure aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallAftermath data.

findings.issue: Soul return, caster death, host death, body distance, body dead, and container destruction outcomes are too specific for current duration fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending and soul-return outcome fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime magicJarEndConditions data.

findings.issue: Reverting to cloud form and the end-of-effect safe descent/fall sequence are represented as utility options but need first-class transformation and on-end movement consequence fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation state and on-spell-end descent/fall fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformationState and onSpellEndMovementConsequence data.

groups.title: End Cleanup: Space Or Passage Ejection
groups.closureRule: Spell-created spaces, passages, or containers end and move their contents to an exit, anchor, nearest space, or other explicit destination.

findings.issue: Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, and Fiend targets do not return if the spell lasts for 1 minute; runtime has no typed duration-completion branch by creature type.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional ending fields for no-return-on-full-duration with creature-type filters.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for full-duration extraplanar banishment.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the target reappears in its original space or nearest unoccupied space, unless the creature-type full-duration branch prevents return; runtime lacks return placement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add post-spell return placement fields for original space and nearest unoccupied fallback.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime returnPlacement data.

findings.issue: The spell-end sequence makes the sphere fall, extinguishes normal flames within 30 feet, knocks restrained creatures prone where it falls, and then makes the water vanish; runtime lacks typed spell-end cleanup sequence fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ordered spell-end cleanup fields for created areas with occupant and environmental effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cleanupOnEnd sequence data.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the target reappears in its original space or nearest unoccupied fallback; runtime lacks typed spell-end return placement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end return placement fields for banishment effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime returnPlacement data.

findings.issue: The spell-end return leaves the target in its original or nearest unoccupied space, but runtime lacks typed post-effect placement state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath placement fields for post-banishment return.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellEndAftermath return placement data.

findings.issue: The ordinary 'Until the spell ends' duration is represented, but the special ending when the caster ends movement inside earth or stone is only described in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers tied to invalid end positions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalSpellEnd data for ending inside earth or stone.

groups.title: Delivery Failure, Cooldown, Or Availability
groups.closureRule: A spell can fail delivery, create a later casting block, enforce a cooldown, or depend on target/soul availability.

findings.issue: Detect Thoughts can end on successful Wisdom save against deeper probe or on a target's action Intelligence (Arcana) check while attention remains shifted; only prose carries the Arcana escape and attention condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending and escape-check fields for successful probe save, target Arcana action, and shift-attention-away condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endConditions for successful probe save and target action Intelligence (Arcana) check against spell save DC.

findings.issue: Sending has delivery failure and recipient-created block conditions that can cause later casts to fail.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery failure and recipient block/cooldown fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deliveryFailure and recipientBlock duration 8 hours with failure result on blocked recast.

findings.issue: If caster movement would force an affected creature through the barrier, the spell ends; runtime lacks movement-forced early-ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura early-ending fields tied to caster movement forcing blocked creatures through the barrier.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for forced barrier crossing.

findings.issue: Beam use reduces the wall length by 10 feet whether the attack hits or misses, and the spell ends when the length reaches 0 feet; runtime lacks this ending condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mutable dimension and zero-length ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallLengthReduction and zeroLengthEnds data.

groups.title: Vision, Light, Sound, Or Sensory
groups.closureRule: Light, sound, visibility, senses, cover, heat, or sensory emission/suppression needs runtime data.

findings.issue: The spell explicitly removes the emitted light and any Exhaustion levels it caused when the spell ends, but runtime lacks typed cleanup of caused conditions/riders.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end cleanup fields for caused conditions and light riders.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cleanupOnEnd data.

findings.issue: Moving the Cylinder when the caster moves and applying effects when creatures enter/end turn/move into it are represented, but runtime lacks first-class moving area and once-per-turn affected tracking.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving area and once-per-turn affected fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingArea and oncePerTurnEffectLimit data.

groups.title: Save Counter Or Recurring End
groups.closureRule: Recurring saves, counted successes/failures, branch outcomes, or escape checks end or transform an ongoing effect.

findings.issue: Runtime represents successful repeat save ending, but it still lacks typed data for the flames being impossible to extinguish by nonmagical means.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add extinguishability or ending-prevention fields for magical ongoing effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endingRestrictions data for nonmagical extinguishing immunity.

findings.issue: The pain ends on a successful end-of-turn Constitution save, but runtime currently stores that in status aftermath/utility options rather than a typed recurring end condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring save end-condition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime recurringSaveEndCondition data.

groups.title: Sustain, Range, Cover, Or Upkeep
groups.closureRule: A later action, range requirement, total-cover condition, or upkeep failure ends the spell or effect.

findings.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save, on caster using an action for anything else, when target leaves range, or when target has total cover; runtime lacks these branch and ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add branch-ending and sustain-ending fields for save success, action use, range loss, and total cover.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime enervationEnding data.

groups.title: Needs Manual Subfamily
groups.closureRule: No confident keyword match; classify manually before editing.

findings.issue: The target's death aftermath happens at the start of the caster's next turn and needs a typed aftermath/timing surface.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add start-of-next-turn death aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathAftermath timing data.

groups.title: Illusion, Disguise, Or Reveal
groups.closureRule: Illusion/disguise behavior, reveal conditions, study actions, physical interaction, or apparent state needs runtime data.

findings.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save and after breach-trigger damage; runtime records the damage but lacks first-class conditional spell-ending triggers.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers for save success and breach events.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalSpellEnd data.
